name: HMS Hind (U 39)
events: 4 May 1944 HMS Sealion (Lt. P.E. Newstead, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Hind (Cdr. (Retd.) R.W. Keymer, RN) and HMS Woodcock (Cdr.(Retd.) J.F. Blackburn, DSO, RN). (1)
30 Jun 1945 HMS Hind (Lt.Cdr. A.D. White, RD, RNR) is docked in the Gabbari Graving Dock at Alexandria. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
